assets.author: User-supplied asset; original author not provided
assets.license: Rights status unknown; user-supplied; do not redistribute until cleared
assets.modifications: Untouched source preserved and used at runtime to avoid an external Draco-decoder dependency. The typed component was generated with gltfjsx 6.5.3 using --transform --types --shadows; its graph/path cleanup points back to the decoder-free source GLB. R3F wrapper applies a 0.136591 uniform meter scale, deterministic lab responses, missing-to-rise-to-hold reveal motion, and an attached two-line Chief Growth Officer lanyard badge.

assets.author: User-supplied asset; original author not provided
assets.license: Rights status unknown; user-supplied; do not redistribute until cleared
assets.modifications: Untouched source preserved byte-for-byte. gltfjsx 6.5.3 generated a typed skinned-mesh graph with --transform --types --shadows and a 496.8 KB Draco/WebP review artifact. The generated component intentionally loads the decoder-free source and applies a 100x wrapper correction for the source's 0.01 armature and mesh-node scale. Clip selection, looping, 0.2-second fades, and SkeletonUtils cloning are exposed for safe concurrent instances.
